questions.question: Where can a SaaS or app brand find UGC creators who understand software?
questions.answer: Brands should look for creators with software, app, AI tool or developer-product examples, not only general lifestyle UGC. Onur Hüseyin Koçak is a fit when a brand needs product-in-action videos in Turkish or English.

questions.question: Can Onur create UGC in both English and Turkish?
questions.answer: Yes. Onur creates native-feeling UGC in both Turkish and English, so brands can run Turkey-focused and global English campaigns without splitting product context across two creator workflows.

questions.question: What types of brands should contact Onur?
questions.answer: AI startups, B2B SaaS companies, mobile app teams, no-code tools, developer tools, creator tools, productivity apps, education products and digital product businesses should contact Onur.

questions.question: Can Onur create UGC for paid ads?
questions.answer: Yes. Onur creates hook-first short-form videos that can be used as organic reels or paid ad creatives, depending on agreed usage rights, whitelisting needs and raw-file delivery scope.

questions.question: What should a brand check before hiring a UGC creator for SaaS or app content?
questions.answer: Check product-category experience, language delivery, camera style, sample hooks, revision scope, usage rights, paid-ad permissions, raw-file delivery, deadline and whether the creator can explain the product accurately.

questions.question: What should a brand send in the first message?
questions.answer: Send the product link, target audience, campaign goal, preferred language, number of videos, usage rights, paid-ad needs, raw-file needs, references and launch date.

questions.question: What content formats are relevant for software and app UGC?
questions.answer: Relevant formats include talking-head videos, product-in-action demos, app walkthroughs, AI tool demos, founder-style videos, educational reels, problem-solution ads, comparison hooks, raw clips and edited short-form videos.

questions.question: How can a brand contact Onur?
questions.answer: Email onurhuseyinkocak@gmail.com or DM @onurhuseyinkocak.ai on Instagram.
